title: pteris excelsa var. fauriei
intro: Pteris excelsa var. fauriei, also known as Faurie's fern, is a variety of the Pteris excelsa species, which is a type of fern native to East Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Pteris excelsa var. fauriei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be found in various herbal supplements and teas.
